data.title: LLVision's Leion Hey2 AR Translation Glasses are popular for Valentine's Day gifts, featured in 15+ U.S. TV and radio programs.
data.description: LLVision's Leion Hey2 AR Translation Glasses were recently showcased on over 15 TV and radio programs throughout the United States. The widespread national exposure occurred leading up to Valentine's Day in 2026.

data.title: Upcoming AGM for Orion Corporation with important details; Shareholders to convene for crucial discussions.
data.description: The total number of COVID-19 cases worldwide has reached over 200 million, with approximately 4.3 million deaths reported. In the United States alone, there have been more than 35 million confirmed cases and 615,000 deaths. The global vaccination effort has resulted in over 4 billion doses administered. Despite these efforts, new variants continue to pose a threat, leading to ongoing concerns about the pandemic's impact on global health and economy. Public health officials urge continued vigilance and adherence to safety measures to prevent further spread of the virus.

data.title: Bilibili Inc. to report Q4 and FY 2025 financials on March 5, 2026, with earnings call at 7:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: An earnings call is set to take place at 7:00 a.m. Eastern Time on March 5, 2026, where financial results and performance will be discussed. The call will provide shareholders and investors with insights into the company's earnings. This event is crucial for stakeholders as it will reveal important figures regarding the company's financial health and future prospects. Mark your calendars for this significant event in the business world.

data.title: Fortuna Mining Corp extends high-grade gold mineralization at Séguéla Mine, Côte d’Ivoire, including 6.1 g/t Au over 18.9 meters.
data.description: Fortuna Mining Corp. (NYSE: FSM | TSX: FVI) announced positive exploration drilling results at the Sunbird deposit in the Séguéla Mine, Côte d’Ivoire. The recent drilling has extended mineralization at depth and expanded a second high-grade mineralized shoot, showing promising prospects for the company. This development signifies a significant step forward in the ongoing exploration efforts at the site.

data.title: Financial statement for Orion Group released for January-December 2025.
data.description: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, marking an increase of 1.3% from the previous quarter. This translates to approximately 2.5 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the report highlights a decrease in GDP growth to 2.1% for the same quarter, down from 3.5% in the previous quarter. Inflation has also seen a slight uptick, reaching 3.2% compared to 2.8% last quarter. Overall, these numbers indicate a challenging economic outlook for the nation.

data.title: CoinShares XBT Provider crypto ETPs now accessible to retail investors via Nordea, Nordic region's largest group.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, in Saint Helier, Jersey, CoinShares International Limited (Nasdaq Stockholm: CS; US OTCQX: CNSRF), a top asset manager focusing on digital assets, disclosed that its CoinShares XBT Provider exchange-traded products can be accessed by retail investors via Nordea. Nordea, the leading financial services group in the Nordic region, is now offering these products, marking a significant expansion in the availability of CoinShares' offerings to the retail market.

data.title: Funding Circle and Waterfall Asset Management agree on new £700 million deal, further strengthening their partnership.
data.description: Funding Circle, the top SME finance platform in the UK, has revealed its most recent deal with Waterfall Asset Management and Citi.

data.title: RPX Corp partners with Patlytics to enhance RPX Empower, AI-powered patent platform. Expands capabilities for subscribers.
data.description: On Feb. 12, 2026, in San Francisco, RPX Corporation revealed a new collaboration with Patlytics, the top AI-driven patent workflow platform. This partnership aims to enhance RPX Empower's features for users by integrating workflows and providing direct access to Patlytics' services.

data.title: Restaurant industry set for measured growth in 2026 despite challenges. Labor market cooling, cost pressures affecting margins.
data.description: A recent report by the National Restaurant Association has emphasized the growth of the restaurant industry in the United States, but also noted challenges related to profit margins. Released on February 12, 2026, the report predicts a year of steady expansion for the industry. However, this growth is expected to be tempered by various factors such as a tightening labor market, ongoing cost pressures, and consumer household spending trends. The industry is projected to see an increase in revenue, with a focus on managing overhead costs and adapting to changing market conditions. The report signals a positive outlook for the sector in the coming year, even amidst these challenges.

data.title: Study shows improvement in pain and function scores in posterior tibial tendon degeneration patients. Collaboration between University Foot & Ankle Institute and Regenative Labs.
data.description: In February 12, 2026, doctors from University Foot & Ankle Institute partnered with Regenative Labs to release findings from a peer-reviewed observational cohort study. The study focused on exploring the effectiveness of umbilical cord connective tissue.

data.title: UK gov't taps HSBC for tokenized bond pilot to enhance efficiency, cut costs, and boost security through blockchain.
data.description: The United Kingdom has selected HSBC Orion to lead its DIGIT pilot program, which will focus on investigating the potential of blockchain technology in the bonds market. The initiative aims to enhance operational efficiency, reduce expenses, and bolster security measures. This strategic move underscores the UK's commitment to leveraging innovative solutions, with significant emphasis on blockchain's capabilities to transform traditional financial processes.

data.title: Foundation grants $1.9M to Yes to Care Program for improving veterinary access, addressing costs.
data.description: Open Door Veterinary Collective in Grand Rapids, Ohio, received a generous $1.9 million grant from the Dave & Cheryl Duffield Foundation, a charitable organization in Incline Village, Nevada. The grant will fund the Yes to Care program, a collaborative initiative that aims to alleviate the financial burden of veterinary care. Over the course of three years, this unique program will offer innovative solutions for veterinary teams and pet families struggling with the increasing costs of veterinary services. Open Door Veterinary Collective has joined forces with Varidi to launch this pilot program.

data.title: AIxCrypto Inc. partners with BitMart to launch co-branded virtual prepaid card. Key milestone achieved for bridging Web3 capabilities.
data.description: Los Angeles, on February 11, 2026, AIxCrypto Inc. disclosed a strategic alliance with BitMart to introduce a co-branded virtual prepaid card. This move signifies a significant advancement in AIxC's plan to connect Web3 functionalities with everyday transactions. The company's stock symbol on NASDAQ is AIXC.
